## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

## .github

### .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/pull_request_template.md
```
h2 Description
h2 Type of Change
h2 Related Issues
h2 Changes Made
h2 Testing
h3 Test Environment
h3 Test Cases
h2 Breaking Changes
h2 Documentation
h2 Checklist
h2 Package Building
h2 Screenshots/Output
h2 Additional Notes
```

### .github/dependabot.yml
```
keys: [version, updates]
```

### .github/workflows/_reusable-docker-build.yml
```
keys: [name, on, jobs]
job: build
```

### .github/workflows/coverage.yml
```
keys: [name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: coverage
job: trend-analysis
job: quality-gate
```

### .github/workflows/dependencies.yml
```
keys: [name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: analyze
job: update
job: summary
```

### .github/workflows/_reusable-security-scan.yml
```
keys: [name, on, jobs]
job: security-scan
```

### .github/workflows/docker.yml
```
keys: [name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: matrix-prep
job: docker-build
```

### .github/workflows/release.yml
```
keys: [name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: validate
job: goreleaser
job: containers
job: packages
job: notify
```

```
keys: [name, on, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: quality
job: security
job: test
job: build
job: integration
job: docs
job: ci-success
```

keys: [name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, jobs]
job: sast
job: vulnerability-scan

job: secrets-detection
job: container-security
job: security-summary
```

keys: [name, on, jobs]
job: setup
```
